text:
About Anupam Bearings

Anupam Bearings is a certified Timken parts supplier based in India, with offices in Bengaluru and Chennai. Founded under the visionary leadership of Mr. Anant Kumar Singh, Founder and Mentor, Anupam Bearings has secured a significant share in the national market. The company began its Timken partnership in 2023, marking the beginning of a powerful and enduring alliance built on shared values, innovation, and a relentless pursuit of excellence. Together with Timken, Anupam Bearings is committed to driving forward India's industrial growth one bearing at a time.

The company began its Timken partnership in 2023, marking the beginning of a powerful and enduring alliance built on shared values, innovation, and a relentless pursuit of excellence. Together with Timken, Anupam Bearings is committed to driving forward India's industrial growth one bearing at a time.

Anupam Bearings Bengaluru Office

Bengaluru Office: No. 128, Jigani Link Road, Bommasandra Industrial Area, Bengaluru - 560 099, Karnataka. Phone: +91-98844-00741. Additional numbers: +91-96771-13860, +91-98400-88509. Email: sales@anupambearings.com. The Bengaluru office handles sales and distribution for Karnataka and surrounding regions.

Anupam Bearings Chennai Office

Chennai Office: No. 3 (Old No.2) Katchaleeswarar Pagoda Lane, Parrys, Chennai - 600001, Tamil Nadu. Phone: 044-4691-2265, 044-4779-1419. Additional numbers: +91-98400-88509, +91-98844-00509. Email: info@anupambearings.com. The Chennai office serves Tamil Nadu, Andhra Pradesh, and surrounding southern states.

Timken Partnership and Certification

Anupam Bearings is an authorized and certified Timken parts supplier since 2023. Timken, founded in the 1890s by Henry Timken, is a global leader in tapered roller bearings with over 125 years of engineering excellence. Timken supplies bearings to industries ranging from automotive to aerospace. As a certified partner, Anupam Bearings guarantees genuine Timken products with full warranty and quality assurance.

Timken, founded in the 1890s by Henry Timken, is a global leader in tapered roller bearings with over 125 years of engineering excellence. Timken supplies bearings to industries ranging from automotive to aerospace. As a certified partner, Anupam Bearings guarantees genuine Timken products with full warranty and quality assurance.

Services Offered by Anupam Bearings

Anupam Bearings offers the following services: mapping customer requirements to the right products; organising training programmes, seminars and bearing clinics to address specific problems; preventive and pro-active maintenance programs; pre-dispatch inspection service to ensure quality; assistance in mounting and maintenance of bearings; just-in-time (JIT) deliveries to minimize inventory; annual rate contracts for predictable pricing; annual service contracts for ongoing support; bearing banks to ensure critical spares availability; and technical consultation for industrial applications.

Website and Online Presence

Anupam Bearings website: www.anupambearings.com. Customers can browse products, submit enquiries, and contact the team through the website. General enquiries: info@anupambearings.com. Sales enquiries: sales@anupambearings.com.

Tapered Roller Bearings

Timken tapered roller bearings are designed to handle combined radial and axial loads simultaneously. Available in bore sizes from 0 to 8 inches (standard range) and 8 to 24 inches (large bore). Key features: high load capacity, high precision, long service life, suitable for heavy machinery, gearboxes, wheel hubs, conveyors, and mining equipment. Available as single-row, double-row, and four-row configurations. Anupam Bearings stocks a comprehensive range of Timken tapered roller bearings for immediate dispatch.

Key features: high load capacity, high precision, long service life, suitable for heavy machinery, gearboxes, wheel hubs, conveyors, and mining equipment. Available as single-row, double-row, and four-row configurations. Anupam Bearings stocks a comprehensive range of Timken tapered roller bearings for immediate dispatch.

Cylindrical Roller Bearings (CRB)

Cylindrical roller bearings (CRB) are designed for heavy radial loads and high-speed applications. Available as single-row, double-row, and 4-row cylindrical roller bearings. The 4-row CRB is ideal for rolling mill applications with extremely heavy radial loads. Features: high stiffness, low friction, separable inner and outer rings for easy installation, suitable for machine tool spindles, electric motors, gearboxes, and continuous casting machines. Anupam Bearings supplies Timken CRBs ranging from small industrial sizes to 10-32 inch large bore variants manufactured at the Bharuch facility.

Features: high stiffness, low friction, separable inner and outer rings for easy installation, suitable for machine tool spindles, electric motors, gearboxes, and continuous casting machines. Anupam Bearings supplies Timken CRBs ranging from small industrial sizes to 10-32 inch large bore variants manufactured at the Bharuch facility.

Spherical Roller Bearings (SRB)

Spherical roller bearings (SRB) feature a self-aligning design that accommodates shaft misalignment and deflection. Ideal for applications where shaft deflection is unavoidable. Features: high radial load capacity, moderate axial load capacity, self-aligning up to 1.5-2 degrees, sealed and open variants available. Applications: industrial fans, paper machines, gearboxes, crushers, vibrating screens, and heavy conveyors. Available in sizes from 10 to 32 inches from Timken's Bharuch facility through Anupam Bearings.

Features: high radial load capacity, moderate axial load capacity, self-aligning up to 1.5-2 degrees, sealed and open variants available. Applications: industrial fans, paper machines, gearboxes, crushers, vibrating screens, and heavy conveyors. Available in sizes from 10 to 32 inches from Timken's Bharuch facility through Anupam Bearings.

Double Row Tapered Roller Bearings

Double row tapered roller bearings are designed for applications requiring support of both radial and axial loads in both directions simultaneously. Features: compact design combining two single-row bearings, high rigidity, minimal axial displacement, pre-set internal clearance. Applications: wheel bearings, machine tool spindles, rolling mill back-up rolls, heavy-duty gearboxes. Timken double row tapered bearings are available through Anupam Bearings.

Spherical Plain Bearings

Spherical plain bearings are maintenance-free bearings designed for oscillating and slow rotational movements. Features: self-lubricating PTFE or bronze liner, high load capacity, compact design, maintenance-free operation, suitable for static and dynamic loads. Applications: construction equipment, agricultural machinery, hydraulic cylinders, robotic arms, and structural joints. Available in steel-steel and steel-bronze variants through Anupam Bearings.

Features: self-lubricating PTFE or bronze liner, high load capacity, compact design, maintenance-free operation, suitable for static and dynamic loads. Applications: construction equipment, agricultural machinery, hydraulic cylinders, robotic arms, and structural joints. Available in steel-steel and steel-bronze variants through Anupam Bearings.

Graphite Bush Bearings

Graphite bush bearings (also called self-lubricating bushings) use embedded graphite plugs to provide continuous lubrication without external grease or oil. Features: operates in temperatures from -200°C to +650°C, no lubrication maintenance required, excellent for dirty and wet environments, suitable for slow speeds and oscillating loads. Applications: glass manufacturing, steel plants, food processing, oven conveyors, and high-temperature industrial equipment. Available through Anupam Bearings.

Features: operates in temperatures from -200°C to +650°C, no lubrication maintenance required, excellent for dirty and wet environments, suitable for slow speeds and oscillating loads. Applications: glass manufacturing, steel plants, food processing, oven conveyors, and high-temperature industrial equipment. Available through Anupam Bearings.

Ball Transfer Units

Ball transfer units (BTUs) are omnidirectional conveying elements that allow loads to move freely in any horizontal direction. Features: 360-degree movement capability, ball-on-ball rolling contact, low friction, available in pressed steel, cast iron, and stainless steel housings. Capacity ranges from 25 kg to 500 kg per unit. Applications: material handling systems, packaging lines, sorting tables, assembly lines, and airport baggage systems. Available through Anupam Bearings.

Features: 360-degree movement capability, ball-on-ball rolling contact, low friction, available in pressed steel, cast iron, and stainless steel housings. Capacity ranges from 25 kg to 500 kg per unit. Applications: material handling systems, packaging lines, sorting tables, assembly lines, and airport baggage systems. Available through Anupam Bearings.

Combined Roller Bearings

Combined roller bearings integrate radial cylindrical roller bearings with axial needle or cylindrical roller bearings into a single compact unit. Features: handles combined radial and axial loads in minimal installation space, high rigidity, precision, suitable for high-speed operation. Applications: machine tools, printing machines, textile machinery, and automation equipment. Available through Anupam Bearings.

Pillow Block Bearing Housings

Pillow block bearing housings (also called plummer blocks) are cast iron or pressed steel housings that mount onto flat surfaces and accept self-aligning ball or roller bearings. Features: split housing design for easy installation without shaft removal, multiple sealing options (labyrinth, contact, non-contact), grease nipple fittings for lubrication, SNL and SNA series available. Applications: conveyors, fans, pumps, gearboxes, agricultural equipment, and general industrial machinery. Anupam Bearings stocks a full range of Timken pillow block housings.

Features: split housing design for easy installation without shaft removal, multiple sealing options (labyrinth, contact, non-contact), grease nipple fittings for lubrication, SNL and SNA series available. Applications: conveyors, fans, pumps, gearboxes, agricultural equipment, and general industrial machinery. Anupam Bearings stocks a full range of Timken pillow block housings.

SNT Plummer Block Bearing Housing

The Timken SNT series plummer block housings are split housing units specifically designed for tapered roller bearing assemblies. Features: heavy-duty cast iron or ductile iron construction, precision-machined bores, built-in end covers with labyrinth seals, oil bath or grease lubrication options, suitable for high loads and shock loading. Available in standard and heavy-duty versions for bore sizes from 1.5 to 8 inches. Applications: steel mills, mining equipment, paper machines, heavy conveyors. Supplied by Anupam Bearings across India.

Features: heavy-duty cast iron or ductile iron construction, precision-machined bores, built-in end covers with labyrinth seals, oil bath or grease lubrication options, suitable for high loads and shock loading. Available in standard and heavy-duty versions for bore sizes from 1.5 to 8 inches. Applications: steel mills, mining equipment, paper machines, heavy conveyors. Supplied by Anupam Bearings across India.

Timken Split Bearing Housings

Timken split bearing housings are two-piece designs that allow the housing to be separated without removing the shaft or associated equipment. Features: reduces maintenance downtime significantly, interchangeable with competitor designs, precision bore alignment, available in standard and heavy-duty grades, suitable for Timken spherical roller and cylindrical roller bearings. Applications: cement plants, mining, steel mills, paper mills, power generation, and any critical machinery where downtime is costly. Available from Anupam Bearings.

Features: reduces maintenance downtime significantly, interchangeable with competitor designs, precision bore alignment, available in standard and heavy-duty grades, suitable for Timken spherical roller and cylindrical roller bearings. Applications: cement plants, mining, steel mills, paper mills, power generation, and any critical machinery where downtime is costly. Available from Anupam Bearings.

Spherical Roller Solid Block Housings

Solid block housings are one-piece cast iron or steel housings for spherical roller bearings in applications requiring maximum rigidity. Features: one-piece construction for highest rigidity, multiple mounting positions (foot, flanged, take-up), sealed variants for contaminated environments, heavy-duty designs for loads up to several tonnes. Applications: heavy industrial machinery, mining crushers, large fans, and high-vibration environments. Supplied by Anupam Bearings.

Features: one-piece construction for highest rigidity, multiple mounting positions (foot, flanged, take-up), sealed variants for contaminated environments, heavy-duty designs for loads up to several tonnes. Applications: heavy industrial machinery, mining crushers, large fans, and high-vibration environments. Supplied by Anupam Bearings.

Linear Motion Bearings - LM Bush and Ball Screw

Linear motion (LM) bush bearings are precision components for smooth, low-friction linear motion guidance. LM bush bearings feature recirculating ball elements in a cylindrical housing for rolling contact along a ground shaft. Ball screw support units are precision assemblies for mounting ball screws, providing axial rigidity and smooth rotation. Key specs: accuracy class N (normal), H (high), P (precision); available in standard, long (L), and open (UU) types; bore sizes from 6mm to 100mm. Applications: CNC machine tools, robotics, automation equipment, measuring instruments, and 3D printers. Available from Anupam Bearings.

text:
Cross Roller Guides and Precision Lock Nuts

Cross roller guides use crossed cylindrical rollers arranged alternately at 90 degrees for extremely high rigidity and precision in both radial and axial directions simultaneously. Features: very high moment stiffness, compact design, suitable for high precision and high load applications. Precision lock nuts are used to accurately position bearings on shafts with minimal runout and vibration. Available in metric sizes with locking tabs or deformable elements. Applications: machine tools, semiconductor equipment, and medical devices. Available through Anupam Bearings.

metadata.title: Cross Roller Guides and Precision Lock Nuts

text: Features: very high moment stiffness, compact design, suitable for high precision and high load applications. Precision lock nuts are used to accurately position bearings on shafts with minimal runout and vibration. Available in metric sizes with locking tabs or deformable elements. Applications: machine tools, semiconductor equipment, and medical devices. Available through Anupam Bearings.

metadata.title: Cross Roller Guides and Precision Lock Nuts

text:
Lead Screws for Linear Motion

Lead screws (also called power screws) convert rotary motion into linear motion through a threaded shaft and nut system. Compared to ball screws, lead screws are lower cost with higher friction but are self-locking (useful for vertical applications). Features: acme or trapezoidal thread profiles, stainless steel or alloy steel construction, available with anti-backlash nuts, pitch options from 2mm to 20mm. Applications: 3D printers, CNC routers, medical tables, actuators, and laboratory equipment. Available from Anupam Bearings.

Compared to ball screws, lead screws are lower cost with higher friction but are self-locking (useful for vertical applications). Features: acme or trapezoidal thread profiles, stainless steel or alloy steel construction, available with anti-backlash nuts, pitch options from 2mm to 20mm. Applications: 3D printers, CNC routers, medical tables, actuators, and laboratory equipment. Available from Anupam Bearings.

Power Transmission - Chain and Sprocket Systems

Anupam Bearings supplies a full range of power transmission chains and sprockets. Standard roller chains: ANSI/ISO metric and inch, simplex, duplex, and triplex. Special chains: reclaimer chains for bulk material handling, flight chains for vertical conveyors, heavy-duty elevator chains for grain and cement elevators, welded steel chains for heavy industrial drag conveyors. Sprockets: single and multi-strand, standard and large pitch, finished bore or plain bore. Applications: conveyors, hoists, mining, agriculture, food processing, and material handling. Available from Anupam Bearings.

metadata.title: Power Transmission - Chain and Sprocket Systems

text: Special chains: reclaimer chains for bulk material handling, flight chains for vertical conveyors, heavy-duty elevator chains for grain and cement elevators, welded steel chains for heavy industrial drag conveyors. Sprockets: single and multi-strand, standard and large pitch, finished bore or plain bore. Applications: conveyors, hoists, mining, agriculture, food processing, and material handling. Available from Anupam Bearings.

text:
V-Belt Pulleys and Timing Belt Drives

V-belt drives: classical A, B, C, D, E section belts with matching cast iron and steel pulleys. Narrow V-belts: SPZ, SPA, SPB, SPC for higher power density. Timing belts (synchronous drives): HTD (high torque drive), GT2, and trapezoidal tooth profiles for zero-slip power transmission. Timing pulleys: aluminium, steel, and cast iron with various hub configurations. Features: maintenance-free operation, precise speed ratios, no lubrication required, low noise. Applications: pumps, compressors, HVAC equipment, conveyors, textile machinery. Available from Anupam Bearings.

metadata.title: V-Belt Pulleys and Timing Belt Drives

text: Timing belts (synchronous drives): HTD (high torque drive), GT2, and trapezoidal tooth profiles for zero-slip power transmission. Timing pulleys: aluminium, steel, and cast iron with various hub configurations. Features: maintenance-free operation, precise speed ratios, no lubrication required, low noise. Applications: pumps, compressors, HVAC equipment, conveyors, textile machinery. Available from Anupam Bearings.

metadata.title: V-Belt Pulleys and Timing Belt Drives

text:
Couplings for Shaft Connection

Shaft couplings transmit torque between two shafts while accommodating misalignment. Types available: jaw couplings (flexible, dampens vibration), disc couplings (zero-backlash, high speed), grid couplings (shock-absorbing, heavy duty), rigid couplings (flanged and sleeve types), flexible pin-and-bush couplings. Bore sizes from 10mm to 200mm. Material: cast iron, ductile iron, and steel. Applications: pumps, compressors, gearboxes, motors, and any shaft-to-shaft connection. Available from Anupam Bearings.

Types available: jaw couplings (flexible, dampens vibration), disc couplings (zero-backlash, high speed), grid couplings (shock-absorbing, heavy duty), rigid couplings (flanged and sleeve types), flexible pin-and-bush couplings. Bore sizes from 10mm to 200mm. Material: cast iron, ductile iron, and steel. Applications: pumps, compressors, gearboxes, motors, and any shaft-to-shaft connection. Available from Anupam Bearings.

Groeneveld-BEKA Automatic Lubrication Systems

Groeneveld-BEKA supplies reliable automatic lubrication systems for transport, construction, mining, agriculture, and industrial applications. Systems available: single-line progressive systems (divider valve based), dual-line systems (for very long lines), multi-point systems (for many lubrication points), and oil circulation systems. Benefits: extends bearing and component life by ensuring correct lubrication at all times, reduces manual lubrication labor, prevents over- and under-lubrication, suitable for harsh environments. Compatible with grease up to NLGI grade 2 and various oils. Supplied by Anupam Bearings across India.

Benefits: extends bearing and component life by ensuring correct lubrication at all times, reduces manual lubrication labor, prevents over- and under-lubrication, suitable for harsh environments. Compatible with grease up to NLGI grade 2 and various oils. Supplied by Anupam Bearings across India.

Seals - Oil Seals and Bearing Seals

Oil seals (radial shaft seals) prevent lubricant leakage and contamination ingress. Types: single lip, double lip, with and without garter spring, PTFE-lined for chemical resistance. Materials: NBR (nitrile), FKM (Viton) for high temperature, PTFE for chemical environments. Bearing seals: contact seals (2RS), non-contact shields (2Z), and labyrinth seals for extreme contamination. Sizes from 6mm bore to 500mm bore. Applications: gearboxes, motors, hydraulic cylinders, agricultural equipment. Anupam Bearings stocks a comprehensive seal range.

metadata.title: Seals - Oil Seals and Bearing Seals

text: Materials: NBR (nitrile), FKM (Viton) for high temperature, PTFE for chemical environments. Bearing seals: contact seals (2RS), non-contact shields (2Z), and labyrinth seals for extreme contamination. Sizes from 6mm bore to 500mm bore. Applications: gearboxes, motors, hydraulic cylinders, agricultural equipment. Anupam Bearings stocks a comprehensive seal range.

text:
Bearing Pullers and Induction Heaters

Bearing pullers: mechanical two and three-arm pullers for bearing removal without shaft damage. Hydraulic pullers for heavy-duty bearing removal (up to 100-tonne pulling force). Internal pullers for bearings seated in housings. Induction bearing heaters: electric induction heaters for safe, fast, and damage-free bearing mounting. No open flame required. Temperatures controlled to 110°C maximum to prevent bearing tempering. Models from tabletop units for small bearings to floor-standing models for large bore bearings. Reduces mounting time by 80% compared to oil bath heating. Available from Anupam Bearings.

No open flame required. Temperatures controlled to 110°C maximum to prevent bearing tempering. Models from tabletop units for small bearings to floor-standing models for large bore bearings. Reduces mounting time by 80% compared to oil bath heating. Available from Anupam Bearings.

Industrial Greases

Industrial greases for bearing and machinery lubrication. Types: general purpose lithium grease (NLGI 2, -20°C to +130°C), high-temperature grease (polyurea or calcium sulphonate, up to 200°C), extreme pressure (EP) grease with molybdenum disulphide or graphite additives for heavy loads, food-grade grease (NSF H1 approved) for food processing equipment, marine grease (water-resistant for outdoor/marine applications), and electrically insulating grease for electrical connectors. Available in cartridges (400g), tubs (1kg, 5kg), and drums (18kg, 180kg). Available from Anupam Bearings.

Types: general purpose lithium grease (NLGI 2, -20°C to +130°C), high-temperature grease (polyurea or calcium sulphonate, up to 200°C), extreme pressure (EP) grease with molybdenum disulphide or graphite additives for heavy loads, food-grade grease (NSF H1 approved) for food processing equipment, marine grease (water-resistant for outdoor/marine applications), and electrically insulating grease for electrical connectors. Available in cartridges (400g), tubs (1kg, 5kg), and drums (18kg, 180kg). Available from Anupam Bearings.

How to select the right bearing

Selecting the right bearing involves considering: 1) Load type - radial loads use cylindrical or ball bearings; axial loads use thrust bearings; combined loads use tapered roller or angular contact bearings. 2) Speed - high speeds favour ball bearings; heavy loads at moderate speeds favour roller bearings. 3) Misalignment - use spherical roller or self-aligning ball bearings when shaft deflection is expected. 4) Environment - sealed bearings (2RS) for contaminated environments; open bearings for clean, well-lubricated conditions. 5) Temperature - standard bearings for -20°C to +120°C; special greases and materials for extreme temperatures. Contact Anupam Bearings at info@anupambearings.com for technical selection assistance.

metadata.title: How to select the right bearing

text: 4) Environment - sealed bearings (2RS) for contaminated environments; open bearings for clean, well-lubricated conditions. 5) Temperature - standard bearings for -20°C to +120°C; special greases and materials for extreme temperatures. Contact Anupam Bearings at info@anupambearings.com for technical selection assistance.

text:
Bearing designation system explained

Timken and standard bearing designations follow this pattern: first digits indicate bore size code (e.g., 06 = 30mm bore), then series width (0-4, narrow to wide), then series diameter (0-4, light to heavy). Suffixes: 2RS = rubber sealed both sides; ZZ or 2Z = metal shielded both sides; C3 = increased radial clearance; P6 = precision class 6; M = brass cage. Example: 6308-2RS-C3 = deep groove ball bearing, bore 40mm, medium series, rubber sealed, C3 clearance. Timken tapered bearings use their own numbering system - contact Anupam Bearings for cross-reference assistance.

Suffixes: 2RS = rubber sealed both sides; ZZ or 2Z = metal shielded both sides; C3 = increased radial clearance; P6 = precision class 6; M = brass cage. Example: 6308-2RS-C3 = deep groove ball bearing, bore 40mm, medium series, rubber sealed, C3 clearance. Timken tapered bearings use their own numbering system - contact Anupam Bearings for cross-reference assistance.

Bearing installation best practices

Correct bearing installation is critical for long service life. Key rules: 1) Always use an induction heater to mount bearings - never use direct flame; heat to 80-110°C maximum. 2) Never strike the bearing races with a hammer; use a proper mounting sleeve that contacts the ring being pressed. 3) Always push force through the ring being seated (inner ring on shaft, outer ring in housing). 4) Clean all mounting surfaces before installation. 5) Check shaft and housing tolerances with a micrometer before mounting. 6) Apply correct amount of grease (1/3 to 1/2 fill of bearing cavity). Anupam Bearings provides mounting assistance and training programmes.

4) Clean all mounting surfaces before installation. 5) Check shaft and housing tolerances with a micrometer before mounting. 6) Apply correct amount of grease (1/3 to 1/2 fill of bearing cavity). Anupam Bearings provides mounting assistance and training programmes.

Bearing failure analysis and diagnosis

Common bearing failure modes and causes: 1) Fatigue spalling - normal end-of-life or overloading; check load calculations. 2) Wear - insufficient lubrication or contamination; improve sealing and lubrication intervals. 3) Corrosion - moisture ingress; use sealed bearings or better sealing. 4) Fretting corrosion (false brinelling) - vibration during storage or transport; use anti-fretting grease. 5) Electric current damage (fluting) - stray electrical currents; use insulated bearings or grounded shaft. 6) Overheating - over-greasing, insufficient clearance, or overload; check clearance and lubrication. Anupam Bearings offers bearing clinics and failure analysis consultations.

4) Fretting corrosion (false brinelling) - vibration during storage or transport; use anti-fretting grease. 5) Electric current damage (fluting) - stray electrical currents; use insulated bearings or grounded shaft. 6) Overheating - over-greasing, insufficient clearance, or overload; check clearance and lubrication. Anupam Bearings offers bearing clinics and failure analysis consultations.

Lubrication intervals and grease quantities

Grease quantity formula: G = 0.005 x D x B (grams), where D = bearing OD in mm, B = bearing width in mm. Over-greasing is the most common lubrication mistake - it causes overheating and premature failure. Regreasing intervals depend on speed (N) and bore diameter (d): interval hours = 14,000,000 / (n x sqrt(d)) - 4d. For sealed bearings (2RS), no regreasing is needed for life. For open bearings in normal conditions, regreasing every 2,000 to 4,000 hours is typical. High temperature or contaminated environments require more frequent regreasing. Contact Anupam Bearings for application-specific lubrication advice.

For sealed bearings (2RS), no regreasing is needed for life. For open bearings in normal conditions, regreasing every 2,000 to 4,000 hours is typical. High temperature or contaminated environments require more frequent regreasing. Contact Anupam Bearings for application-specific lubrication advice.

Delivery, lead times and availability

Anupam Bearings maintains comprehensive stock of Timken bearings and related products at both Bengaluru and Chennai locations. Standard items from stock are available for immediate dispatch with same-day shipping for orders placed before 2pm. Lead times for non-stock items: standard Timken products 3-7 working days; special or large bore products 2-4 weeks. Annual rate contracts and bearing banks ensure priority access to critical spares. Just-in-time (JIT) delivery arrangements available for high-volume customers. Contact sales@anupambearings.com or call +91-98844-00741 for stock availability and lead times.

Lead times for non-stock items: standard Timken products 3-7 working days; special or large bore products 2-4 weeks. Annual rate contracts and bearing banks ensure priority access to critical spares. Just-in-time (JIT) delivery arrangements available for high-volume customers. Contact sales@anupambearings.com or call +91-98844-00741 for stock availability and lead times.

How to request a quote

To request a quotation from Anupam Bearings, provide: 1) Bearing part number or drawing dimensions (bore, OD, width, type). 2) Quantity required. 3) Delivery location. 4) Application details (speed, load, temperature, environment). Contact methods: Email sales@anupambearings.com for detailed quote requests; call +91-98844-00741 (Bengaluru) or 044-4691-2265 (Chennai) for urgent enquiries; use the website enquiry form at www.anupambearings.com; visit either office directly. Annual rate contracts are available for customers with regular requirements - contact the sales team to discuss.

Contact methods: Email sales@anupambearings.com for detailed quote requests; call +91-98844-00741 (Bengaluru) or 044-4691-2265 (Chennai) for urgent enquiries; use the website enquiry form at www.anupambearings.com; visit either office directly. Annual rate contracts are available for customers with regular requirements - contact the sales team to discuss.

Timken India manufacturing footprint

Timken India operates multiple manufacturing facilities: Jamshedpur plant produces 0-8 inch tapered roller bearings and rail cartridge bearings, and performs rail and large bore bearing repair; Bangalore facility (Timken India HQ) produces 8-24 inch tapered roller bearings and high-precision cylindrical roller bearings, and is the centre for global product technology, manufacturing technology, shared services and IT; Chennai plant (located in Special Economic Zone) produces 0-8 inch TRBs and CRBs; Bharuch plant produces TRBs, SRBs and CRBs for industrial applications from 10 to 32 inches, and slewing bearings from 12 to 100 inches. As an authorized Timken partner, Anupam Bearings supplies products from all these facilities across India.

Comparing bearing types for applications

Quick application guide: Conveyor systems - use tapered roller or spherical roller bearings in plummer block housings. Electric motors - deep groove ball bearings for light loads; cylindrical roller for heavier radial loads; angular contact for axial loads. Gearboxes - cylindrical roller (sun gear shafts), tapered roller (high axial loads), needle roller (space-constrained). Pumps - deep groove ball bearings for light duty; cylindrical or spherical roller for heavy duty. Fans and blowers - cylindrical roller bearings for high radial loads. Machine tool spindles - angular contact or cylindrical roller, precision class P5 or P4. Agricultural equipment - taper roller or spherical roller in sealed housings. Mining crushers - spherical roller in heavy-duty plummer blocks.

Fans and blowers - cylindrical roller bearings for high radial loads. Machine tool spindles - angular contact or cylindrical roller, precision class P5 or P4. Agricultural equipment - taper roller or spherical roller in sealed housings. Mining crushers - spherical roller in heavy-duty plummer blocks.

Bearing storage and handling guidelines

Proper storage of bearings: store in original packaging in a dry, cool environment (10-25°C), away from direct sunlight and vibration. Bearings should be stored horizontally (not standing on edge). Maximum storage life: 3 years for bearings with standard grease; 5 years with special storage grease; check manufacturer recommendations. Handling: never remove bearings from packaging until ready to install; use clean gloves to prevent corrosion from fingerprints; do not spin dry bearings - always lubricate first; avoid dropping or striking bearings. Anupam Bearings provides pre-dispatch inspection to ensure all products are in perfect condition before shipping.

Handling: never remove bearings from packaging until ready to install; use clean gloves to prevent corrosion from fingerprints; do not spin dry bearings - always lubricate first; avoid dropping or striking bearings. Anupam Bearings provides pre-dispatch inspection to ensure all products are in perfect condition before shipping.
